Uploaded patch set 2.

Patch Set 2: Looks good to me, but someone else must approve

According to https://maloo.whamcloud.com/test_sets/769ba1de-08cb-11e3-a9b0-52540035b04c (test for http://review.whamcloud.com/6910) the tests that are still failing have been left on the ALWAYS_EXCEPT list.  I think it makes sense to land this patch so that more HSM testing is enabled on an ongoing basis.

Patch Set 2:

Jinshan, I'm not really sure why you resubmitted this patch instead of landing the original one?  That would enable these tests to run for every build.

"Jinshan, I'm not really sure why you resubmitted this patch instead of landing the original one? That would enable these tests to run for every build."

The patch version #1 is based on another patch of mine so Oleg suggested that I should resubmit the patch based on current master.

Patch Set 6: I would prefer that you didn't submit this

(1 inline comment)

As much as I want to land this patch and close LU-3561, I don't want to relegate tests 34, 35, 36 to be ignored forever in the future.  My experience is that failing and disabled tests that are not tracked very closely will never be re-enabled.

commit.subject: LU-3815 tests: HSM sanity test suites
commit.message:
LU-3815 tests: HSM sanity test suites

Reevaluate the exception list.
Enable all sanity-hsm tests except #34, #35, #36 and #40.

Signed-off-by: Jinshan Xiong <jinshan.xiong@intel.com>
Change-Id: I66dbf6f5119fc75b379752a33a8d5e44562ff985
Reviewed-on: http://review.whamcloud.com/7374
Tested-by: Hudson
Reviewed-by: Aurelien Degremont <aurelien.degremont@cea.fr>
Reviewed-by: jacques-Charles Lafoucriere <jacques-charles.lafoucriere@cea.fr>
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <andreas.dilger@intel.com>
Tested-by: Maloo <whamcloud.maloo@gmail.com>
Reviewed-by: Jian Yu <jian.yu@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <oleg.drokin@intel.com>
